nasb.text: And another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven, and he also had a sharp sickle.

esv.text: Then another angel came out of the temple in heaven, and he too had a sharp sickle.

cnv.text: 又有另一位天使從天上的聖所出來，他也拿著一把鋒利的鐮刀。

ccb.text: 另一位天使手里也拿着锋利的镰刀从天上的殿中出来。

csbs.text: 又一位天使从天上的圣所中出来，他也拿着一把锋利的镰刀。
